flags.label: Private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Ultimate Medical Academy are 31% below the private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer median ($29.2k vs $42.1k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ultimate Medical Academy fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
